description_long: This is a hardbound book with a textured, matte cover in a gradient of blue-gray tones. The front cover features a detailed black-and-white illustration of a whimsical tea party scene, likely from the story of Alice's Adventures in Wonderland, with several characters gathered around a table. The back cover displays a monochrome illustration of a large, leafless tree with intricate branches. The spine is solid blue-gray and does not display any visible text or decorative elements. The book appears to be of average thickness, with visible cream-colored pages sandwiched between the covers. The overall appearance is classic and literary, suitable for display or reading in an urban environment.
description: A hardbound book with a blue-gray textured cover, featuring a whimsical tea party illustration on the front and a tree illustration on the back.
description_view_0: The front cover shows a detailed tea party illustration with several characters and the book's title and author in black text.
description_view_1: The spine of the book is visible, showing a solid blue-gray color with no visible text or decoration.
description_view_2: The back cover features a monochrome illustration of a large, leafless tree with intricate branches.
description_view_3: The opposite edge of the spine is shown, again solid blue-gray with no visible markings.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration on the front cover depicts a lively tea party scene with several whimsical characters seated around a table, rendered in a detailed, black-and-white sketch style. The artwork is intricate, capturing expressive faces and dynamic postures, evoking the fantastical atmosphere of the story.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is a solid blue-gray color with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. It appears plain and unadorned.
